title: Sheetal Patel
compiled_truth: Sheetal Patel is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-12-10 to 2002-02-21), Sheetal Patel sent 22 and received 319 emails, totalling 341 interactions. Top correspondents: [Tana Jones](people/tana-jones) (5), [Sara Shackleton](people/sara-shackleton) (5), [Larry Hunter](people/larry-hunter) (5), [Errol Mclaughlin](people/errol-mclaughlin) (5), [Susan Bailey](people/susan-bailey) (3).
